subject: [PATCH v2 04/18] ntfs3: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch updates the ntfs3 file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is a more efficient way of handling iomap operations. The update uses the iomap_process() helper function to finish previous mappings and produce the next one. No functional changes are intended by this conversion.
